title: Repatriation Costs in Case of Failure to Repatriate. When those
content: 34 primarily responsible for the repatriation fail to fulfill their obligations, a recommendation 35 to advance the repatriation costs using the AKSYON Fund under the DMW or the 36 Emergency Repatriation Fund (ERF) and OWWA Funds under the OWWA may be 37 endorsed to the Department, subject to the reimbursement of the costs by the LMA or 38 principal/employer and the imposition of appropriate administrative sanctions against the 39 LMA or principal/employer before the Department. 40 41

metadata.source_file: [NOTICE TO PUBLIC] CLEAN DRAFT OF THE DMW SEABASED RULES.pdf
